External IDs mapping to the external source will be cleared, and the customer will no longer be updated by the integration.' (Mutation.customerUnsync)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.customerUpdate' description changed from 'Updates a customer' to 'Updates an existing customer.' (Mutation.customerUpdate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.customerUpsert' description changed from 'Upserts a customer, creating it if it doesn't exists, updating it otherwise. Matches against an existing customer with `id` or `externalId`' to 'Upserts a customer, creating it if no match is found, or updating it otherwise. Matches against existing customers using `id`, `externalId`, `slackChannelId`, or `domains`.' (Mutation.customerUpsert)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.cycleArchive' description changed from 'Archives a cycle.' to 'Archives a cycle. All issues currently assigned to the cycle are unlinked from it before archiving.' (Mutation.cycleArchive)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Description for argument 'input' on field 'Mutation.cycleShiftAll' changed from 'A partial cycle object to update the cycle with.' to 'The shift parameters specifying which cycle to start from and how many days to shift.' (Mutation.cycleShiftAll.input)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.cycleStartUpcomingCycleToday' description changed from 'Shifts all cycles starts and ends by a certain number of days, starting from the provided cycle onwards.' to 'Starts the upcoming cycle as of midnight today. Completes the previous cycle if it has not yet ended. Only the next upcoming (not yet started) cycle for the team can be started.' (Mutation.cycleStartUpcomingCycleToday)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.documentDelete' description changed from 'Deletes (trashes) a document.' to 'Deletes (trashes) a document. The document is marked as trashed and archived, but not permanently removed.' (Mutation.documentDelete)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.documentUnarchive' description changed from 'Restores a document.' to 'Restores a previously trashed document by unarchiving it.' (Mutation.documentUnarchive)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.entityExternalLinkCreate' description changed from 'Creates a new entity link.' to 'Creates a new external link on an initiative, project, team, release, or cycle.' (Mutation.entityExternalLinkCreate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.entityExternalLinkDelete' description changed from 'Deletes an entity link.' to 'Deletes an entity external link.' (Mutation.entityExternalLinkDelete)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.entityExternalLinkUpdate' description changed from 'Updates an entity link.' to 'Updates an existing entity external link's URL, label, or sort order.' (Mutation.entityExternalLinkUpdate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.favoriteCreate' description changed from 'Creates a new favorite (project, cycle etc).' to 'Creates a new favorite for the authenticated user. Exactly one target entity must be specified. If a favorite for the same entity already exists, the existing favorite is returned (upsert behavior).' (Mutation.favoriteCreate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.favoriteDelete' description changed from 'Deletes a favorite reference.' to 'Deletes a favorite, removing it from the user's sidebar. This is an idempotent operation -- deleting a non-existent favorite succeeds silently.' (Mutation.favoriteDelete)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.favoriteUpdate' description changed from 'Updates a favorite.' to 'Updates a favorite's position, parent folder, or folder name.' (Mutation.favoriteUpdate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.gitAutomationStateCreate' description changed from 'Creates a new automation state.' to 'Creates a new Git automation rule that maps a Git event to a workflow state transition for a team.' (Mutation.gitAutomationStateCreate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.gitAutomationStateDelete' description changed from 'Archives an automation state.' to 'Deletes a Git automation rule.' (Mutation.gitAutomationStateDelete)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.gitAutomationStateUpdate' description changed from 'Updates an existing state.' to 'Updates an existing Git automation rule, including its workflow state, target branch, and triggering event.' (Mutation.gitAutomationStateUpdate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.gitAutomationTargetBranchCreate' description changed from 'Creates a Git target branch automation.' to 'Creates a new Git target branch definition that scopes automation rules to pull requests targeting a specific branch pattern.' (Mutation.gitAutomationTargetBranchCreate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.gitAutomationTargetBranchDelete' description changed from 'Archives a Git target branch automation.' to 'Deletes a Git target branch definition and its associated automation rules.' (Mutation.gitAutomationTargetBranchDelete)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.gitAutomationTargetBranchUpdate' description changed from 'Updates an existing Git target branch automation.' to 'Updates an existing Git target branch definition, including its branch pattern and regex flag.' (Mutation.gitAutomationTargetBranchUpdate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.initiativeArchive' description changed from 'Archives a initiative.' to 'Archives an initiative.' (Mutation.initiativeArchive)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.initiativeRelationCreate' description changed from 'Creates a new initiative relation.' to 'Creates a new parent-child relation between two initiatives. The relation cannot create cycles or exceed maximum nesting depth.' (Mutation.initiativeRelationCreate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.initiativeToProjectCreate' description changed from 'Creates a new initiativeToProject join.' to 'Associates a project with an initiative. A project can only appear once in an initiative hierarchy.' (Mutation.initiativeToProjectCreate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.initiativeToProjectUpdate' description changed from 'Updates a initiativeToProject.' to 'Updates an initiative-to-project association, such as its sort order.' (Mutation.initiativeToProjectUpdate)

(Mutation.integrationSlackOrgProjectUpdatesPost)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.integrationTemplateCreate' description changed from 'Creates a new integrationTemplate join.' to 'Creates a new connection between a template and an integration, optionally scoped to a specific external resource such as a Slack channel.'   feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.integrationZendesk' description changed from 'Integrates the organization with Zendesk.' to 'Integrates the workspace with Zendesk.' (Mutation.integrationZendesk)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Description for argument 'linearSourceOrganizationId' on field 'Mutation.issueImportCreateLinearV2' changed from 'The source organization to import from.' to 'The source workspace to import from.' (Mutation.issueImportCreateLinearV2.linearSourceOrganizationId)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.issueLabelRestore' description changed from 'Restores a label.' to 'Restores a previously retired label, making it available for use again.' (Mutation.issueLabelRestore)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.issueLabelRetire' description changed from 'Retires a label.' to 'Retires a label. Retired labels are still visible but cannot be applied to new issues. Existing issues with the label are not affected.' (Mutation.issueLabelRetire)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.issueToReleaseCreate' description changed from '[ALPHA] Creates a new issueToRelease join, adding an issue to a release.' to '[ALPHA] Creates a new association between an issue and a release, linking the issue to the release for tracking purposes.'   feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.issueToReleaseDelete' description changed from '[ALPHA] Deletes an issueToRelease by its identifier, removing an issue from a release.' to '[ALPHA] Deletes an issue-to-release association by its identifier, removing the issue from the release.' (Mutation.issueToReleaseDelete)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Description for argument 'id' on field 'Mutation.issueToReleaseDelete' changed from 'The identifier of the issueToRelease to delete' to 'The identifier of the issue-to-release association to delete.' (Mutation.issueToReleaseDelete.id)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.issueToReleaseDeleteByIssueAndRelease' description changed from '[ALPHA] Deletes an issueToRelease by issue and release identifiers' to '[ALPHA] Deletes an issue-to-release association by looking up the issue and release identifiers, removing the issue from the release.' (Mutation.issueToReleaseDeleteByIssueAndRelease)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Description for argument 'releaseId' on field 'Mutation.issueToReleaseDeleteByIssueAndRelease' changed from 'The identifier of the release' to 'The identifier of the release.' (Mutation.issueToReleaseDeleteByIssueAndRelease.releaseId)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.jiraIntegrationConnect' description changed from '[INTERNAL] Connects the organization with a Jira Personal Access Token.' to '[INTERNAL] Connects the workspace with a Jira Personal Access Token.' (Mutation.jiraIntegrationConnect)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.joinOrganizationFromOnboarding' description changed from 'Join an organization from onboarding.' to 'Join a workspace from onboarding.' (Mutation.joinOrganizationFromOnboarding)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Description for argument 'input' on field 'Mutation.joinOrganizationFromOnboarding' changed from 'Organization details for the organization to join.' to 'Details of the workspace to join.' (Mutation.joinOrganizationFromOnboarding.input)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.leaveOrganization' description changed from 'Leave an organization.' to 'Leave a workspace.' (Mutation.leaveOrganization)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Description for argument 'organizationId' on field 'Mutation.leaveOrganization' changed from 'ID of the organization to leave.' to 'ID of the workspace to leave.' (Mutation.leaveOrganization.organizationId)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.notificationCategoryChannelSubscriptionUpdate' description changed from 'Subscribes to or unsubscribes from a notification category for a given notification channel for the user' to 'Subscribes to or unsubscribes from a specific notification category for a given notification channel. For example, subscribe to 'issueAssignment' notifications via the 'email' channel.' (Mutation.notificationCategoryChannelSubscriptionUpdate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.notificationSubscriptionCreate' description changed from 'Creates a new notification subscription for a cycle, custom view, label, project or team.' to 'Creates a new notification subscription for a specific entity. The subscription determines which notification types the authenticated user will receive for the target entity. Exactly one target entity (customer, custom view, cycle, initiative, label, project, team, or user) must be specified.' (Mutation.notificationSubscriptionCreate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Description for argument 'id' on field 'Mutation.notificationUnarchive' changed from 'The id of the notification to archive.' to 'The id of the notification to unarchive.' (Mutation.notificationUnarchive.id)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.organizationCancelDelete' description changed from 'Cancels the deletion of an organization.' to 'Cancels a previously requested workspace deletion, if the workspace has not yet been fully deleted.' (Mutation.organizationCancelDelete)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.organizationDelete' description changed from 'Deletes an organization.' to 'Permanently deletes the workspace and all its data. Requires a valid deletion code obtained from organizationDeleteChallenge. This action is irreversible.' (Mutation.organizationDelete)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Description for argument 'input' on field 'Mutation.organizationDelete' changed from 'Information required to delete an organization.' to 'Information required to delete the workspace.' (Mutation.organizationDelete.input)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.organizationDeleteChallenge' description changed from 'Get an organization's delete confirmation token.' to 'Requests a deletion confirmation code for the workspace. The code is sent to the requesting user's email and must be used with the organizationDelete mutation to confirm deletion.' (Mutation.organizationDeleteChallenge)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.organizationDomainCreate' description changed from '[INTERNAL] Adds a domain to be allowed for an organization.' to '[INTERNAL] Adds a domain to be allowed for a workspace.' (Mutation.organizationDomainCreate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.organizationDomainUpdate' description changed from '[INTERNAL] Updates an organization domain settings.' to '[INTERNAL] Updates a workspace domain's settings.' (Mutation.organizationDomainUpdate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.organizationDomainVerify' description changed from '[INTERNAL] Verifies a domain to be added to an organization.' to '[INTERNAL] Verifies a domain to be added to a workspace.' (Mutation.organizationDomainVerify)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.organizationInviteCreate' description changed from 'Creates a new organization invite.' to 'Creates a new workspace invite and sends an invitation email to the specified address. The invite includes a role assignment and optional team memberships.' (Mutation.organizationInviteCreate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.organizationInviteDelete' description changed from 'Deletes an organization invite.' to 'Deletes (archives) a workspace invite, preventing it from being accepted.' (Mutation.organizationInviteDelete)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.organizationInviteUpdate' description changed from 'Updates an organization invite.' to 'Updates an existing workspace invite, such as changing the teams the invitee will be added to.' (Mutation.organizationInviteUpdate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.organizationStartTrial' description changed from '[DEPRECATED] Starts a trial for the organization.' to '[DEPRECATED] Starts a trial for the workspace.' (Mutation.organizationStartTrial)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.organizationStartTrialForPlan' description changed from 'Starts a trial for the organization on the specified plan type.' to 'Starts a trial for the workspace on the specified plan type. The workspace must not already be on a paid plan or in an active trial.' (Mutation.organizationStartTrialForPlan)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.organizationUpdate' description changed from 'Updates the user's organization.' to 'Updates the user's workspace settings. Different settings require different permission levels; most require the workspaceSettings admin permission.' (Mutation.organizationUpdate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Description for argument 'input' on field 'Mutation.organizationUpdate' changed from 'A partial organization object to update the organization with.' to 'A partial workspace object to update the workspace with.' (Mutation.organizationUpdate.input)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Description for argument 'response' on field 'Mutation.passkeyLoginFinish' changed from 'undefined' to 'The WebAuthn authenticator response from the passkey challenge.' (Mutation.passkeyLoginFinish.response)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Description for argument 'input' on field 'Mutation.projectCreate' changed from 'The issue object to create.' to 'The project properties to set on the new project.' (Mutation.projectCreate.input)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.projectDelete' description changed from 'Deletes (trashes) a project.' to 'Deletes (trashes) a project. The project can be restored later with projectUnarchive.' (Mutation.projectDelete)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.projectLabelRestore' description changed from 'Restores a project label.' to 'Restores a previously retired project label, making it available for use on new projects.' (Mutation.projectLabelRestore)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.projectLabelRetire' description changed from 'Retires a project label.' to 'Retires a project label. Retired labels remain on existing projects but cannot be applied to new ones.' (Mutation.projectLabelRetire)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.projectReassignStatus' description changed from '[INTERNAL] Updates all projects currently assigned to to a project status to a new project status.' to '[INTERNAL] Reassigns all projects from one project status to another. Used when archiving or deleting a project status.' (Mutation.projectReassignStatus)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.projectStatusArchive' description changed from 'Archives a project status.' to 'Archives a project status. The status must not have any active projects assigned to it and must not be the last status of its type.' (Mutation.projectStatusArchive)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.projectUnarchive' description changed from 'Unarchives a project.' to 'Restores a previously trashed or archived project.' (Mutation.projectUnarchive)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Description for argument 'input' on field 'Mutation.projectUpdateUpdate' changed from 'A data to update the project update with.' to 'The properties of the project update to update.' (Mutation.projectUpdateUpdate.input)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.pushSubscriptionCreate' description changed from 'Creates a push subscription.' to 'Creates a push subscription for the authenticated user's current device or browser. If a subscription already exists for the same session, the old one is replaced.' (Mutation.pushSubscriptionCreate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.pushSubscriptionDelete' description changed from 'Deletes a push subscription.' to 'Deletes a push subscription, unregistering the device from receiving push notifications.' (Mutation.pushSubscriptionDelete)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.releaseCreate' description changed from '[ALPHA] Creates a new release.' to '[ALPHA] Creates a new release in a pipeline. If no stage is specified, defaults to the first completed stage for continuous pipelines or the first started stage for scheduled pipelines.' (Mutation.releaseCreate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.releaseDelete' description changed from '[ALPHA] Deletes (trashes) a release.' to '[ALPHA] Moves a release to the trash bin. Trashed releases are archived and will be permanently deleted after a retention period. If the release is already archived, it is marked as trashed with a fresh archive timestamp.' (Mutation.releaseDelete)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.releasePipelineCreate' description changed from '[ALPHA] Creates a new release pipeline.' to '[ALPHA] Creates a new release pipeline with default stages. Subject to plan entitlement and quota limits.' (Mutation.releasePipelineCreate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.releasePipelineDelete' description changed from '[ALPHA] Deletes a release pipeline.' to '[ALPHA] Permanently deletes a release pipeline and all associated stages and releases.' (Mutation.releasePipelineDelete)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.releasePipelineUpdate' description changed from '[ALPHA] Updates a release pipeline.' to '[ALPHA] Updates an existing release pipeline. Supports updating name, slug, type, production flag, path patterns, and team associations. Private teams that the current user cannot access are preserved in the team list.' (Mutation.releasePipelineUpdate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.releaseStageArchive' description changed from '[ALPHA] Archives a release stage.' to '[ALPHA] Archives a release stage. Only started-type stages can be archived, and only if they have no active releases and at least one other stage of the same type remains. Cannot archive the last non-frozen started stage.' (Mutation.releaseStageArchive)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.releaseStageCreate' description changed from '[ALPHA] Creates a new release stage.' to '[ALPHA] Creates a new release stage in a pipeline. Non-started stages must use default names and colors, and only one stage of each non-started type is allowed per pipeline. Started stages can optionally be frozen, but at least one non-frozen started stage must remain.' (Mutation.releaseStageCreate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.releaseStageUpdate' description changed from '[ALPHA] Updates a release stage.' to '[ALPHA] Updates an existing release stage. Only started-type stages can be edited. Supports updating name, color, position, and frozen status.' (Mutation.releaseStageUpdate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.releaseSync' description changed from '[ALPHA] Syncs release data.' to '[ALPHA] Syncs release data by resolving issue and pull request references and associating them with a release. For continuous pipelines, creates a new completed release. For scheduled pipelines, finds or creates a started release and accumulates issues into it.' (Mutation.releaseSync)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.releaseSyncByAccessKey' description changed from '[ALPHA] Syncs release data using an access key. The pipeline is inferred from the access key.' to '[ALPHA] Syncs release data using an access key for CI/CD integration. The pipeline is automatically inferred from the access key's configured resources, so no pipeline ID is needed in the input.' (Mutation.releaseSyncByAccessKey)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.releaseUpdate' description changed from '[ALPHA] Updates a release.' to '[ALPHA] Updates an existing release by ID. Supports updating name, description, version, commit SHA, pipeline, stage, and dates.' (Mutation.releaseUpdate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.releaseUpdateByPipeline' description changed from '[ALPHA] Updates a release by pipeline.' to '[ALPHA] Updates a release by pipeline identifier. Finds the release by version or latest started/planned release, and optionally transitions it to a new stage by name.' (Mutation.releaseUpdateByPipeline)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.resendOrganizationInvite' description changed from 'Re-send an organization invite.' to 'Re-sends a workspace invitation email for the specified invite ID.' (Mutation.resendOrganizationInvite)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.resendOrganizationInviteByEmail' description changed from 'Re-send an organization invite tied to an email address.' to 'Re-sends a workspace invitation email to the specified email address, if an outstanding invite exists for that address.' (Mutation.resendOrganizationInviteByEmail)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.roadmapToProjectCreate' description changed from 'Creates a new roadmapToProject join.' to '[Deprecated] Creates a new roadmap-to-project association. Use InitiativeToProject instead.' (Mutation.roadmapToProjectCreate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.roadmapToProjectDelete' description changed from 'Deletes a roadmapToProject.' to '[Deprecated] Deletes a roadmap-to-project association. Use InitiativeToProject instead.' (Mutation.roadmapToProjectDelete)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.roadmapToProjectUpdate' description changed from 'Updates a roadmapToProject.' to '[Deprecated] Updates a roadmap-to-project association. Use InitiativeToProject instead.' (Mutation.roadmapToProjectUpdate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.teamCreate' description changed from 'Creates a new team. The user who creates the team will automatically be added as a member to the newly created team.' to 'Creates a new team. The user who creates the team will automatically be added as a member and owner of the newly created team. Default workflow states, labels, and other team resources are created alongside the team.' (Mutation.teamCreate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.teamCyclesDelete' description changed from 'Deletes team's cycles data' to 'Deletes all cycle data for a team, disabling the cycles feature. This removes all cycles and their issue associations.' (Mutation.teamCyclesDelete)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.teamDelete' description changed from 'Deletes a team.' to 'Archives a team and schedules its data for deletion. Requires team owner or workspace admin permissions.' (Mutation.teamDelete)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.teamKeyDelete' description changed from 'Deletes a previously used team key.' to 'Deletes a previously used team key. The active team key (the team's current key) cannot be deleted.' (Mutation.teamKeyDelete)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.teamMembershipCreate' description changed from 'Creates a new team membership.' to 'Creates a new team membership, adding a user to a team. Validates that the user is not already a member, the team is not archived or retired, and the requesting user has permission to add members.' (Mutation.teamMembershipCreate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.teamMembershipDelete' description changed from 'Deletes a team membership.' to 'Deletes a team membership, removing the user from the team. Users can remove their own membership, or team owners and workspace admins can remove other members.' (Mutation.teamMembershipDelete)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.teamMembershipUpdate' description changed from 'Updates a team membership.' to 'Updates a team membership, such as changing ownership status or sort order.' (Mutation.teamMembershipUpdate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Description for argument 'id' on field 'Mutation.teamUnarchive' changed from 'The identifier of the team to delete.' to 'The identifier of the team to unarchive.' (Mutation.teamUnarchive.id)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.teamUpdate' description changed from 'Updates a team.' to 'Updates a team's settings, properties, or configuration. Requires team owner or workspace admin permissions for most changes.' (Mutation.teamUpdate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.userChangeRole' description changed from 'Changes the role of a user.' to 'Changes the workspace role of a user. The requesting user must have a role equal to or higher than the target role. Requires workspace admin permissions.' (Mutation.userChangeRole)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.userFlagUpdate' description changed from 'Updates a user's settings flag.' to 'Updates a specific user settings flag by performing an operation (e.g., increment or clear) on it.' (Mutation.userFlagUpdate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.userRevokeAllSessions' description changed from 'Revokes a user's sessions. Can only be called by an admin or owner.' to 'Revokes all active sessions for a user, forcing them to re-authenticate. Can only be called by a workspace admin or owner.' (Mutation.userRevokeAllSessions)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.userRevokeSession' description changed from 'Revokes a specific session for a user. Can only be called by an admin or owner.' to 'Revokes a specific authentication session for a user. The admin cannot revoke their own sessions with this mutation. Can only be called by a workspace admin or owner.' (Mutation.userRevokeSession)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.userSettingsFlagsReset' description changed from 'Resets user's setting flags.' to 'Resets one or more of the user's setting flags. If no specific flags are provided, all flags are reset.' (Mutation.userSettingsFlagsReset)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.userSettingsUpdate' description changed from 'Updates the user's settings.' to 'Updates the authenticated user's settings, including notification preferences, email subscriptions, theme, and other UI preferences.' (Mutation.userSettingsUpdate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.userSuspend' description changed from 'Suspends a user. Can only be called by an admin or owner.' to 'Suspends a user, deactivating their account and revoking access to the workspace. The suspended user's sessions are invalidated. Can only be called by a workspace admin or owner.' (Mutation.userSuspend)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.userUnsuspend' description changed from 'Un-suspends a user. Can only be called by an admin or owner.' to 'Re-activates a suspended user, restoring their access to the workspace. Can only be called by a workspace admin or owner.' (Mutation.userUnsuspend)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.userUpdate' description changed from 'Updates a user. Only available to organization admins and the user themselves.' to 'Updates a user's profile information. Users can update their own profile; workspace admins can update any user's profile. SCIM-managed users may have restricted name changes.' (Mutation.userUpdate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.viewPreferencesCreate' description changed from 'Creates a new ViewPreferences object.' to 'Creates a new view preferences object. If conflicting preferences already exist for the same view type and scope, the existing preferences are replaced.' (Mutation.viewPreferencesCreate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.viewPreferencesDelete' description changed from 'Deletes a ViewPreferences.' to 'Deletes a view preferences object. If the preferences do not exist, the operation is treated as a successful idempotent deletion.' (Mutation.viewPreferencesDelete)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.viewPreferencesUpdate' description changed from 'Updates an existing ViewPreferences object.' to 'Updates an existing view preferences object. For user-type preferences, only the owning user can update them.' (Mutation.viewPreferencesUpdate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.webhookCreate' description changed from 'Creates a new webhook.' to 'Creates a new webhook subscription for the workspace. Requires specifying a URL, resource types to subscribe to, and either a specific team or all public teams.' (Mutation.webhookCreate)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Mutation.webhookRotateSecret' description changed from 'Rotates the signing secret for a Webhook.' to 'Rotates the signing secret for a webhook, generating a new HMAC-SHA256 key and returning it. The old secret is immediately invalidated.' (Mutation.webhookRotateSecret)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Notification.actor' description changed from 'The user that caused the notification.' to 'The user that caused the notification. Null if the notification was triggered by a non-user actor such as an integration, external user, or system event.' (Notification.actor)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Notification.emailedAt' description changed from 'The time at when an email reminder for this notification was sent to the user. Null, if no email
  reminder has been sent.' to 'The time at which an email reminder for this notification was sent to the user. Null if no email reminder has been sent.' (Notification.emailedAt)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Notification.externalUserActor' description changed from 'The external user that caused the notification.' to 'The external user that caused the notification. Populated when the notification was triggered by an external user (e.g., a commenter from a connected integration like Slack or GitHub) rather than a Linear workspace member.' (Notification.externalUserActor)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Notification.readAt' description changed from 'The time at when the user marked the notification as read. Null, if the the user hasn't read the notification' to 'The time at which the user marked the notification as read. Null if the notification is unread.' (Notification.readAt)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Notification.snoozedUntilAt' description changed from 'The time until a notification will be snoozed. After that it will appear in the inbox again.' to 'The time until which a notification is snoozed. After this time, the notification reappears in the user's inbox. Null if the notification is not currently snoozed.' (Notification.snoozedUntilAt)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Notification.type' description changed from 'Notification type.' to 'Notification type. Determines the kind of event that triggered this notification and which associated entity fields will be populated.' (Notification.type)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Notification.unsnoozedAt' description changed from 'The time at which a notification was unsnoozed..' to 'The time at which a notification was unsnoozed. Null if the notification has not been unsnoozed.' (Notification.unsnoozedAt)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Notification.user' description changed from 'The user that received the notification.' to 'The recipient user of this notification.' (Notification.user)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Description 'A notification sent to a user.' on type 'Notification' has changed to 'A notification delivered to a user's inbox. Notifications are created in response to activity in the workspace such as issue assignments, comments, mentions, and status changes. Each notification has a specific type that determines the associated entity (issue, project, document, etc.) and the nature of the event. Notifications can be read, snoozed, or archived by the user.' (Notification)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'NotificationBatchActionPayload.notifications' description changed from 'The notifications that were updated.' to 'The notifications that were updated by the batch operation.' (NotificationBatchActionPayload.notifications)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Object type 'NotificationBatchActionPayload' has description 'Return type for batch notification mutations that operate on multiple notifications at once.' (NotificationBatchActionPayload)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Description 'A user's notification category preferences.' on type 'NotificationCategoryPreferences' has changed to 'A user's fully resolved notification category preferences. Each category maps to channel preferences indicating whether mobile, desktop, email, and Slack delivery are enabled.' (NotificationCategoryPreferences)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Description 'A user's notification channel preferences, indicating if a channel is enabled or not' on type 'NotificationChannelPreferences' has changed to 'A user's resolved notification channel preferences, indicating whether each delivery channel (mobile, desktop, email, Slack) is enabled or disabled.' (NotificationChannelPreferences)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Description 'A user's notification delivery preferences.' on type 'NotificationDeliveryPreferences' has changed to 'A user's notification delivery preferences across channels. Currently only supports mobile channel delivery scheduling.' (NotificationDeliveryPreferences)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Description 'A user's notification delivery preferences.' on type 'NotificationDeliveryPreferencesChannel' has changed to 'Delivery preferences for a specific notification channel, including an optional delivery schedule that restricts when notifications are sent.' (NotificationDeliveryPreferencesChannel)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'NotificationDeliveryPreferencesDay.end' description changed from 'The time notifications end.' to 'The end time of the notification delivery window in HH:MM military time format (e.g., '18:00'). Must be later than 'start'.' (NotificationDeliveryPreferencesDay.end)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'NotificationDeliveryPreferencesDay.start' description changed from 'The time notifications start.' to 'The start time of the notification delivery window in HH:MM military time format (e.g., '09:00'). Must be earlier than 'end'.' (NotificationDeliveryPreferencesDay.start)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Description 'A user's notification delivery schedule for a particular day.' on type 'NotificationDeliveryPreferencesDay' has changed to 'A user's notification delivery window for a specific day of the week. Defines the time range during which notifications will be delivered.' (NotificationDeliveryPreferencesDay)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Input field 'NotificationDeliveryPreferencesDayInput.end' description changed from 'The time notifications end.' to 'The end time of the notification delivery window in HH:MM military time format (e.g., '18:00'). Must be later than 'start'.' (NotificationDeliveryPreferencesDayInput.end)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Input field 'NotificationDeliveryPreferencesDayInput.start' description changed from 'The time notifications start.' to 'The start time of the notification delivery window in HH:MM military time format (e.g., '09:00'). Must be earlier than 'end'.' (NotificationDeliveryPreferencesDayInput.start)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'NotificationDeliveryPreferencesSchedule.disabled' description changed from 'Whether the schedule is disabled.' to 'Whether the entire delivery schedule is disabled. When true, notifications are delivered at any time regardless of the per-day settings.' (NotificationDeliveryPreferencesSchedule.disabled)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Description 'A user's notification delivery schedule for a particular day.' on type 'NotificationDeliveryPreferencesSchedule' has changed to 'A user's weekly notification delivery schedule, defining delivery windows for each day of the week. Notifications outside these windows are held and delivered when the window opens.' (NotificationDeliveryPreferencesSchedule)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Input field 'NotificationDeliveryPreferencesScheduleInput.disabled' description changed from 'Whether the schedule is disabled.' to 'Whether the entire delivery schedule is disabled. When true, notifications are delivered at any time regardless of the per-day settings.' (NotificationDeliveryPreferencesScheduleInput.disabled)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Description 'Describes the type and id of the entity to target for notifications.' on type 'NotificationEntityInput' has changed to 'Identifies a specific entity whose related notifications should be targeted by a batch operation. Exactly one entity identifier should be provided.' (NotificationEntityInput)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'NotificationPayload.notification' description changed from 'The notification that was created or updated.' to 'The notification that was updated.' (NotificationPayload.notification)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Object type 'NotificationPayload' has description 'Return type for notification mutations.' (NotificationPayload)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'NotificationSubscription.active' description changed from 'Whether the subscription is active or not.' to 'Whether the subscription is active. When inactive, no notifications are generated from this subscription even though it still exists.' (NotificationSubscription.active)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'NotificationSubscription.contextViewType' description changed from 'The type of view to which the notification subscription context is associated with.' to 'The type of contextual view (e.g., active issues, backlog) that further scopes a team notification subscription. Null if the subscription is not associated with a specific view type.' (NotificationSubscription.contextViewType)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'NotificationSubscription.customView' description changed from 'The contextual custom view associated with the notification subscription.' to 'The custom view that this notification subscription is scoped to. Null if the subscription targets a different entity type.' (NotificationSubscription.customView)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'NotificationSubscription.customer' description changed from 'The customer associated with the notification subscription.' to 'The customer that this notification subscription is scoped to. Null if the subscription targets a different entity type.' (NotificationSubscription.customer)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'NotificationSubscription.cycle' description changed from 'The contextual cycle view associated with the notification subscription.' to 'The cycle that this notification subscription is scoped to. Null if the subscription targets a different entity type.' (NotificationSubscription.cycle)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'NotificationSubscription.initiative' description changed from 'The contextual initiative view associated with the notification subscription.' to 'The initiative that this notification subscription is scoped to. Null if the subscription targets a different entity type.' (NotificationSubscription.initiative)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'NotificationSubscription.label' description changed from 'The contextual label view associated with the notification subscription.' to 'The issue label that this notification subscription is scoped to. Null if the subscription targets a different entity type.' (NotificationSubscription.label)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'NotificationSubscription.project' description changed from 'The contextual project view associated with the notification subscription.' to 'The project that this notification subscription is scoped to. Null if the subscription targets a different entity type.' (NotificationSubscription.project)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'NotificationSubscription.subscriber' description changed from 'The user that subscribed to receive notifications.' to 'The user who will receive notifications from this subscription.' (NotificationSubscription.subscriber)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'NotificationSubscription.team' description changed from 'The team associated with the notification subscription.' to 'The team that this notification subscription is scoped to. Null if the subscription targets a different entity type.' (NotificationSubscription.team)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'NotificationSubscription.user' description changed from 'The user view associated with the notification subscription.' to 'The user that this notification subscription is scoped to, for user-specific view subscriptions. Null if the subscription targets a different entity type.' (NotificationSubscription.user)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'NotificationSubscription.userContextViewType' description changed from 'The type of user view to which the notification subscription context is associated with.' to 'The type of user-specific view that further scopes a user notification subscription. Null if the subscription is not associated with a user view type.' (NotificationSubscription.userContextViewType)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Description 'Notification subscriptions for models.' on type 'NotificationSubscription' has changed to 'A subscription that controls which notifications a user receives for a specific entity such as a team, project, cycle, label, custom view, initiative, or user. This is not a billing subscription -- it determines notification preferences. Each subscription is scoped to exactly one target entity and specifies the notification types the subscriber wants to receive. When active, matching events on the target entity generate notifications for the subscriber.' (NotificationSubscription)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Input field 'NotificationSubscriptionCreateInput.active' description changed from 'Whether the subscription is active.' to 'Whether the subscription is active. Set to false to pause notifications without deleting the subscription.' (NotificationSubscriptionCreateInput.active)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Input field 'NotificationSubscriptionCreateInput.notificationSubscriptionTypes' description changed from 'The types of notifications of the subscription.' to 'The specific notification event types the subscriber wants to receive for the target entity.' (NotificationSubscriptionCreateInput.notificationSubscriptionTypes)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Object type 'NotificationSubscriptionCreateInput' has description 'Input for creating a notification subscription. Exactly one target entity (customer, custom view, cycle, initiative, label, project, team, or user) must be specified along with the notification types to subscribe to.' (NotificationSubscriptionCreateInput)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'NotificationSubscriptionPayload.notificationSubscription' description changed from 'The notification subscription that was created or updated.' to 'The notification subscription that was created or updated. This controls which notifications the user receives for the associated entity.' (NotificationSubscriptionPayload.notificationSubscription)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Object type 'NotificationSubscriptionPayload' has description 'The result of a notification subscription mutation.' (NotificationSubscriptionPayload)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Input field 'NotificationSubscriptionUpdateInput.notificationSubscriptionTypes' description changed from 'The types of notifications of the subscription.' to 'The specific notification event types the subscriber wants to receive. Replaces all previously configured types.' (NotificationSubscriptionUpdateInput.notificationSubscriptionTypes)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Object type 'NotificationSubscriptionUpdateInput' has description 'Input for updating an existing notification subscription. Allows changing the subscribed notification types and active state.' (NotificationSubscriptionUpdateInput)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Input field 'NotificationUpdateInput.initiativeUpdateId' description changed from 'The id of the project update related to the notification.' to 'The id of the initiative update related to the notification.' (NotificationUpdateInput.initiativeUpdateId)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Object type 'NotificationUpdateInput' has description 'Input for updating a notification's read and snooze state.' (NotificationUpdateInput)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OauthClientApproval.denyReason' description changed from 'The reason the request for the OAuth client approval was denied.' to 'An optional explanation from the admin for why the installation request was denied.' (OauthClientApproval.denyReason)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OauthClientApproval.newlyRequestedScopes' description changed from 'New scopes that were requested for approval after the initial request.' to 'Additional OAuth scopes requested after the initial approval. These scopes are not yet approved and require a separate admin decision. Null if no additional scopes have been requested. These scopes will never overlap with the already-approved scopes.' (OauthClientApproval.newlyRequestedScopes)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OauthClientApproval.oauthClientId' description changed from 'The uuid of the OAuth client being requested for installation.' to 'The identifier of the OAuth client application being requested for installation in this workspace.' (OauthClientApproval.oauthClientId)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OauthClientApproval.requestReason' description changed from 'The reason the person wants to install this OAuth client.' to 'An optional message from the requester explaining why they want to install the OAuth application.' (OauthClientApproval.requestReason)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OauthClientApproval.requesterId' description changed from 'The person who requested installing the OAuth client.' to 'The identifier of the user who initiated the request to install the OAuth client application.' (OauthClientApproval.requesterId)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OauthClientApproval.responderId' description changed from 'The person who responded to the request to install the OAuth client.' to 'The identifier of the workspace admin who approved or denied the installation request. Null if the request has not yet been responded to.' (OauthClientApproval.responderId)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OauthClientApproval.scopes' description changed from 'The scopes the app has been approved for.' to 'The OAuth scopes that the application has been approved to use within this workspace (e.g., 'read', 'write', 'issues:create').' (OauthClientApproval.scopes)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OauthClientApproval.status' description changed from 'The status for the OAuth client approval request.' to 'The current status of the approval request: requested (pending admin review), approved, or denied.' (OauthClientApproval.status)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Description 'Request to install OAuth clients on organizations and the response to the request.' on type 'OauthClientApproval' has changed to 'A request to install an OAuth client application on a workspace, along with the admin's approval or denial response. When a user attempts to install an OAuth application that requires admin approval, an approval record is created. A workspace admin can then approve or deny the request, optionally providing a reason. The record also tracks any newly requested scopes that were added after the initial approval.' (OauthClientApproval)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OauthClientApprovalNotification.actor' description changed from 'The user that caused the notification.' to 'The user that caused the notification. Null if the notification was triggered by a non-user actor such as an integration, external user, or system event.' (OauthClientApprovalNotification.actor)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OauthClientApprovalNotification.emailedAt' description changed from 'The time at when an email reminder for this notification was sent to the user. Null, if no email
  reminder has been sent.' to 'The time at which an email reminder for this notification was sent to the user. Null if no email reminder has been sent.' (OauthClientApprovalNotification.emailedAt)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OauthClientApprovalNotification.externalUserActor' description changed from 'The external user that caused the notification.' to 'The external user that caused the notification. Populated when the notification was triggered by an external user (e.g., a commenter from a connected integration like Slack or GitHub) rather than a Linear workspace member.' (OauthClientApprovalNotification.externalUserActor)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OauthClientApprovalNotification.readAt' description changed from 'The time at when the user marked the notification as read. Null, if the the user hasn't read the notification' to 'The time at which the user marked the notification as read. Null if the notification is unread.' (OauthClientApprovalNotification.readAt)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OauthClientApprovalNotification.snoozedUntilAt' description changed from 'The time until a notification will be snoozed. After that it will appear in the inbox again.' to 'The time until which a notification is snoozed. After this time, the notification reappears in the user's inbox. Null if the notification is not currently snoozed.' (OauthClientApprovalNotification.snoozedUntilAt)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OauthClientApprovalNotification.type' description changed from 'Notification type.' to 'Notification type. Determines the kind of event that triggered this notification and which associated entity fields will be populated.' (OauthClientApprovalNotification.type)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OauthClientApprovalNotification.unsnoozedAt' description changed from 'The time at which a notification was unsnoozed..' to 'The time at which a notification was unsnoozed. Null if the notification has not been unsnoozed.' (OauthClientApprovalNotification.unsnoozedAt)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OauthClientApprovalNotification.user' description changed from 'The user that received the notification.' to 'The recipient user of this notification.' (OauthClientApprovalNotification.user)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Description 'An oauth client approval related notification.' on type 'OauthClientApprovalNotification' has changed to 'A notification related to an OAuth client approval request, sent to workspace admins when an application requests access.' (OauthClientApprovalNotification)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.agentAutomationEnabled' description changed from '[INTERNAL] Whether the organization has enabled agent automation.' to '[INTERNAL] Whether the workspace has enabled agent automation.' (Organization.agentAutomationEnabled)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.aiAddonEnabled' description changed from '[INTERNAL] Whether the organization has enabled the AI add-on (which at this point only includes triage suggestions).' to '[INTERNAL] Whether the workspace has enabled the AI add-on (which at this point only includes triage suggestions).' (Organization.aiAddonEnabled)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.aiDiscussionSummariesEnabled' description changed from 'Whether the organization has enabled AI discussion summaries for issues.' to 'Whether the workspace has enabled AI discussion summaries for issues.' (Organization.aiDiscussionSummariesEnabled)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.aiThreadSummariesEnabled' description changed from 'Whether the organization has enabled resolved thread AI summaries.' to 'Whether the workspace has enabled resolved thread AI summaries.' (Organization.aiThreadSummariesEnabled)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.authSettings' description changed from 'Authentication settings for the organization.' to 'Authentication settings for the workspace, including allowed auth providers, bypass rules, and organization visibility during signup.' (Organization.authSettings)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.codeIntelligenceEnabled' description changed from '[INTERNAL] Whether code intelligence is enabled for the organization.' to '[INTERNAL] Whether code intelligence is enabled for the workspace.' (Organization.codeIntelligenceEnabled)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.codingAgentEnabled' description changed from '[INTERNAL] Whether the organization has enabled the Coding Agent.' to '[INTERNAL] Whether the workspace has enabled the Coding Agent.' (Organization.codingAgentEnabled)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.createdIssueCount' description changed from 'Aproximate number of issues in the organization, including archived ones.' to 'Approximate total number of issues created in the workspace, including archived ones. This count is cached and may not reflect the exact real-time count.' (Organization.createdIssueCount)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.customerCount' description changed from 'Number of customers in the organization.' to 'The number of active (non-archived) customers tracked in the workspace.' (Organization.customerCount)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.customersConfiguration' description changed from 'Configuration settings for the Customers feature.' to 'Configuration settings for the Customers feature, including revenue currency and other customer tracking preferences.' (Organization.customersConfiguration)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.customersEnabled' description changed from 'Whether the organization is using Customers.' to 'Whether the Customers feature is enabled and accessible for the workspace based on the current plan.' (Organization.customersEnabled)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.deletionRequestedAt' description changed from 'The time at which deletion of the organization was requested.' to 'The time at which deletion of the workspace was requested. Null if no deletion has been requested.' (Organization.deletionRequestedAt)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.facets' description changed from '[Internal] Facets associated with the organization.' to '[Internal] Facets associated with the workspace, used for configuring custom views and filters.' (Organization.facets)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.feedEnabled' description changed from 'Whether the organization has enabled the feed feature.' to 'Whether the activity feed feature is enabled for the workspace.' (Organization.feedEnabled)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.fiscalYearStartMonth' description changed from 'The month at which the fiscal year starts. Defaults to January (0).' to 'The zero-indexed month at which the fiscal year starts (0 = January, 11 = December). Defaults to 0 (January).' (Organization.fiscalYearStartMonth)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.generatedUpdatesEnabled' description changed from '[INTERNAL] Whether the organization has enabled generated updates.' to '[INTERNAL] Whether the workspace has enabled generated updates.' (Organization.generatedUpdatesEnabled)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.gitBranchFormat' description changed from 'How git branches are formatted. If null, default formatting will be used.' to 'The template format for Git branch names created from issues. Supports template variables like {issueIdentifier} and {issueTitle}. If null, the default formatting will be used.' (Organization.gitBranchFormat)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.gitLinkbackDescriptionsEnabled' description changed from 'Whether issue descriptions should be included in Git integration linkback messages.' to 'Whether issue descriptions should be included in the Git integration linkback messages posted to pull requests.' (Organization.gitLinkbackDescriptionsEnabled)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.gitLinkbackMessagesEnabled' description changed from 'Whether the Git integration linkback messages should be sent to private repositories.' to 'Whether the Git integration linkback messages should be posted as comments on pull requests in private repositories.' (Organization.gitLinkbackMessagesEnabled)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.gitPublicLinkbackMessagesEnabled' description changed from 'Whether the Git integration linkback messages should be sent to public repositories.' to 'Whether the Git integration linkback messages should be posted as comments on pull requests in public repositories.' (Organization.gitPublicLinkbackMessagesEnabled)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.hipaaComplianceEnabled' description changed from 'Whether HIPAA compliance is enabled for organization.' to 'Whether HIPAA compliance is enabled for the workspace.   feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.initiativeUpdateReminderFrequencyInWeeks' description changed from 'The n-weekly frequency at which to prompt for initiative updates. When not set, reminders are off.' to 'The frequency in weeks at which to prompt for initiative updates. When null, initiative update reminders are disabled. Valid values range from 0 to 8.' (Organization.initiativeUpdateReminderFrequencyInWeeks)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.initiativeUpdateRemindersDay' description changed from 'The day at which to prompt for initiative updates.' to 'The day of the week on which initiative update reminders are sent.' (Organization.initiativeUpdateRemindersDay)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.initiativeUpdateRemindersHour' description changed from 'The hour at which to prompt for initiative updates.' to 'The hour of the day (0-23) at which initiative update reminders are sent.' (Organization.initiativeUpdateRemindersHour)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.integrations' description changed from 'Integrations associated with the organization.' to 'Third-party integrations configured for the workspace (e.g., GitHub, Slack, Figma).' (Organization.integrations)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.labels' description changed from 'Labels associated with the organization.' to 'Workspace-level issue labels (not associated with any specific team). These labels are available across all teams in the workspace.' (Organization.labels)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.linearAgentEnabled' description changed from '[Internal] Whether the organization has enabled Linear Agent.' to '[Internal] Whether the workspace has enabled Linear Agent.' (Organization.linearAgentEnabled)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.logoUrl' description changed from 'The organization's logo URL.' to 'The URL of the workspace's logo image. Null if no logo has been uploaded.' (Organization.logoUrl)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.name' description changed from 'The organization's name.' to 'The workspace's name.' (Organization.name)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.periodUploadVolume' description changed from 'Rolling 30-day total upload volume for the organization, in megabytes.' to 'Rolling 30-day total file upload volume for the workspace, measured in megabytes. Used for enforcing upload quotas.' (Organization.periodUploadVolume)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.previousUrlKeys' description changed from 'Previously used URL keys for the organization (last 3 are kept and redirected).' to 'Previously used URL keys for the workspace. The last 3 are kept and automatically redirected to the current URL key.' (Organization.previousUrlKeys)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.projectLabels' description changed from 'Project labels associated with the organization.' to 'Project labels available in the workspace for categorizing projects.' (Organization.projectLabels)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.projectStatuses' description changed from 'The organization's project statuses.' to 'The workspace's available project statuses, which define the lifecycle stages for projects.' (Organization.projectStatuses)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.projectUpdateReminderFrequencyInWeeks' description changed from 'The n-weekly frequency at which to prompt for project updates. When not set, reminders are off.' to 'The frequency in weeks at which to prompt for project updates. When null, project update reminders are disabled. Valid values range from 0 to 8.' (Organization.projectUpdateReminderFrequencyInWeeks)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.projectUpdateRemindersDay' description changed from 'The day at which to prompt for project updates.' to 'The day of the week on which project update reminders are sent.' (Organization.projectUpdateRemindersDay)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.projectUpdateRemindersHour' description changed from 'The hour at which to prompt for project updates.' to 'The hour of the day (0-23) at which project update reminders are sent.' (Organization.projectUpdateRemindersHour)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.releaseChannel' description changed from 'The feature release channel the organization belongs to.' to 'The feature release channel the workspace belongs to, which controls access to pre-release features.' (Organization.releaseChannel)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.releasesEnabled' description changed from '[Internal] Whether release management is enabled for the organization.' to '[Internal] Whether release management is enabled for the workspace.' (Organization.releasesEnabled)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.roadmapEnabled' description changed from 'Whether the organization is using a roadmap.' to 'Whether the roadmap feature is enabled for the workspace.' (Organization.roadmapEnabled)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.samlEnabled' description changed from 'Whether SAML authentication is enabled for organization.' to 'Whether SAML-based single sign-on authentication is enabled for the workspace.' (Organization.samlEnabled)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.scimEnabled' description changed from 'Whether SCIM provisioning is enabled for organization.' to 'Whether SCIM provisioning is enabled for the workspace, allowing automated user and team management from an identity provider.' (Organization.scimEnabled)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.securitySettings' description changed from 'Security settings for the organization.' to 'Security settings for the workspace, including role-based restrictions for invitations, team creation, label management, and other sensitive operations.' (Organization.securitySettings)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.slackProjectChannelsEnabled' description changed from '[Internal] Whether the Slack project channels feature is enabled for the organization.' to '[Internal] Whether the Slack project channels feature is enabled for the workspace.' (Organization.slackProjectChannelsEnabled)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.subscription' description changed from 'The organization's subscription to a paid plan.' to 'The workspace's subscription to a paid plan.' (Organization.subscription)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.teams' description changed from 'Teams associated with the organization.' to 'Teams in the workspace. Returns only teams visible to the requesting user (all public teams plus private teams the user is a member of).' (Organization.teams)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.templates' description changed from 'Templates associated with the organization.' to 'Workspace-level templates (not associated with any specific team). These templates are available across all teams in the workspace.' (Organization.templates)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.themeSettings' description changed from '[ALPHA] Theme settings for the organization.' to '[ALPHA] Theme settings for the workspace.' (Organization.themeSettings)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.trialEndsAt' description changed from 'The time at which the trial will end.' to 'The time at which the current plan trial will end. Null if the workspace is not in a trial period.' (Organization.trialEndsAt)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.trialStartsAt' description changed from 'The time at which the trial started.' to 'The time at which the current plan trial started. Null if the workspace is not in a trial period.' (Organization.trialStartsAt)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.urlKey' description changed from 'The organization's unique URL key.' to 'The workspace's unique URL key, used in URLs to identify the workspace.' (Organization.urlKey)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.userCount' description changed from 'Number of active users in the organization.' to 'The number of active (non-deactivated) users in the workspace.' (Organization.userCount)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'Organization.users' description changed from 'Users associated with the organization.' to 'Users belonging to the workspace. By default only returns active users; use the includeDisabled argument to include deactivated users.' (Organization.users)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Description 'An organization. Organizations are root-level objects that contain user accounts and teams.' on type 'Organization' has changed to 'A workspace (referred to as Organization in the API). Workspaces are the root-level container for all teams, users, projects, issues, and settings. Every user belongs to at least one workspace, and all data is scoped within a workspace boundary.' (Organization)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Input field 'OrganizationAuthSettingsInput.hideNonPrimaryOrganizations' description changed from 'Whether to hide non-primary organizations during signup for users with matching email domains.' to 'Whether to hide non-primary workspaces during signup for users with matching email domains.' (OrganizationAuthSettingsInput.hideNonPrimaryOrganizations)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Object type 'OrganizationAuthSettingsInput' has description 'Input for updating workspace authentication settings.' (OrganizationAuthSettingsInput)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Object type 'OrganizationDeletePayload' has description 'Workspace deletion operation response.' (OrganizationDeletePayload)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OrganizationDomain.authType' description changed from 'What type of auth is the domain used for.' to 'The authentication type this domain is used for. 'general' means standard email-based auth, 'saml' means SAML SSO authentication.' (OrganizationDomain.authType)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OrganizationDomain.claimed' description changed from 'Whether the domains was claimed by the organization through DNS verification.' to 'Whether the domain was claimed by the workspace through DNS TXT record verification. Claimed domains provide stronger ownership proof than email verification and enable additional features like preventing users from creating new workspaces.' (OrganizationDomain.claimed)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OrganizationDomain.disableOrganizationCreation' description changed from 'Prevent users with this domain to create new workspaces.' to 'Whether users with email addresses from this domain are prevented from creating new workspaces. Can only be set on claimed domains.' (OrganizationDomain.disableOrganizationCreation)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OrganizationDomain.name' description changed from 'Domain name.' to 'The domain name (e.g., 'example.com').' (OrganizationDomain.name)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OrganizationDomain.verificationEmail' description changed from 'E-mail used to verify this domain.' to 'The email address used to verify this domain. Null if the domain was verified via DNS or has not been verified.' (OrganizationDomain.verificationEmail)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OrganizationDomain.verified' description changed from 'Is this domain verified.' to 'Whether the domain has been verified via email verification.' (OrganizationDomain.verified)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Description 'Defines the use of a domain by an organization.' on type 'OrganizationDomain' has changed to 'A verified email domain associated with a workspace. Domains are used for automatic team joining, SSO/SAML authentication, and controlling workspace access. Each domain has an authentication type (general or SAML) and can be verified via email or DNS.' (OrganizationDomain)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OrganizationDomainPayload.organizationDomain' description changed from 'The organization domain that was created or updated.' to 'The workspace domain that was created or updated.' (OrganizationDomainPayload.organizationDomain)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Object type 'OrganizationExistsPayload' has description 'Response for checking whether a workspace exists.' (OrganizationExistsPayload)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OrganizationInvite.acceptedAt' description changed from 'The time at which the invite was accepted.   feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OrganizationInvite.email' description changed from 'The invitees email address.' to 'The email address of the person being invited to the workspace.' (OrganizationInvite.email)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OrganizationInvite.expiresAt' description changed from 'The time at which the invite will be expiring. Null, if the invite shouldn't expire.' to 'The time at which the invite will expire and can no longer be accepted. Null if the invite does not have an expiration date.' (OrganizationInvite.expiresAt)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OrganizationInvite.external' description changed from 'The invite was sent to external address.' to 'Whether the invite was sent to an email address outside the workspace's verified domains.' (OrganizationInvite.external)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OrganizationInvite.metadata' description changed from 'Extra metadata associated with the organization invite.' to 'Extra metadata associated with the invite.' (OrganizationInvite.metadata)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OrganizationInvite.organization' description changed from 'The organization that the invite is associated with.' to 'The workspace that the invite is associated with.' (OrganizationInvite.organization)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Field 'OrganizationInvite.role' description changed from 'The user role that the invitee will receive upon accepting the invite.' to 'The workspace role (admin, member, guest, or owner) that the invitee will receive upon accepting the invite.' (OrganizationInvite.role)

  feat(schema): [non_breaking] Description 'An invitation to the organization that has been sent via email.' on type 'OrganizationInvite' has changed to 'A pending invitation to join the workspace, sent via email. Invites specify the role the invitee will receive and can optionally include team assignments. Invites can expire and must be accepted by the invitee to grant workspace access.' (OrganizationInvite)
